notes: Use `weight` to control how often an ad is shown relative to others.
Set `kind` to `image` for affiliate banner tags like A8, or `text` for a card-style sponsor link.
Keep `href` as the click-through URL from the affiliate network.
For A8/image ads, put the banner URL in `imageSrc` and the 1x1 tracking URL in `pixelSrc`.

ads.title: Example sponsor title
ads.copy: Short description for a card-style sponsor link.
